name: build_verify
description: Run the full build verification pipeline: cargo build, cargo check, cargo clippy, cargo fmt, cargo test --no-run, and (optionally) Android build. Reports pass/fail for each gate.

commands.name: full
commands.description: Run all build verification gates (Rust + Android if applicable)

commands.name: rust
commands.description: Run Rust-only verification: build, check, clippy, fmt, test-compile

commands.name: android
commands.description: Run Android verification: assembleDebug + role navigation test

commands.name: wasm
commands.description: Run WASM verification: build + check for wasm32-unknown-unknown target
